mapper.select:
select lfi.id,lfi.`name`, count(pro.id) as pro_num, sum(pro.compensation_money) as pro_money, sum(sub.collection_amount) as pro_amount, (sum(sub.collection_amount)/sum(pro.compensation_money)*100) as collection_ratio from law_firm_info lfi left join project_info pro on lfi.id=pro.law_firm_id left join ( select project_id,lawyer_id,sum(collection_amount) as collection_amount from recovery_payment_collection where collection_status=567117777551429 GROUP BY project_id,lawyer_id ) sub on lfi.id=sub.lawyer_id and pro.id=sub.project_id where lfi.is_deleted = 0
AND lfi.`name` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.name},'%')
group by lfi.id,lfi.`name`
ORDER BY ${request.field} ${request.order}
ORDER BY lfi.id DESC
